content: You are implementing multi-Worker distributed architecture for UltimateCoders. Architecture: Rust gRPC server as central scheduler → publishes ready subtasks to NATS uc.subtask.execute → multiple NatsWorker processes compete via queue group → execute sandbox → report via uc.task.update. Key decisions: NATS queue competition (no leader), Rust-side scheduling (dependency resolution + publish), reuse NatsWorker with --mode worker flag, ConflictDetector for file-level exclusion, heartbeat-based failure detection + subtask reassignment. 5 subtasks: (1) Rust scheduler - dependency resolution + subtask publish, (2) NatsWorker worker mode, (3) file conflict detection, (4) worker failure reassignment, (5) dashboard multi-worker visualization.

Read the PRD at .trellis/tasks/06-22-worker/prd.md for full requirements, architecture diagram, decisions, and acceptance criteria. Read the NATS bridge spec at .trellis/spec/backend/nats-bridge-spec.md for existing NATS subject contracts.
